title: Xtra Chewy Ukrainian Pork Skewers
description: Savory and chewy Ukrainian pork skewers featuring Thai sweet basil, perfect for a solo dinner, made with a mortar and pestle and grilled on a raclette grill.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to medium high heat.
In a mortar and pestle, pound the garlic and Thai sweet basil until well combined.
In a large bowl, combine the pork, garlic and basil mixture, onion, salt, and black pepper, and mix until the pork is evenly coated.
Thread the pork mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with coconut oil.
Place the skewers on the raclette grill and cook for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Cook the skewers to an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Let the skewers rest for 5 minutes before serving.
